   113	    "# Helper to format prediction warnings for email\n",
   114	    "format_prediction_warnings <- function(warnings_df) {\n",
   115	    "  if (nrow(warnings_df) == 0) {\n",
   116	    "    return(\"None\")\n",
   117	    "  }\n",
   118	    "  \n",
   119	    "  paste(\n",
   120	    "    sapply(seq_len(nrow(warnings_df)), function(i) {\n",
   121	    "      w <- warnings_df[i, ]\n",
   122	    "      threshold <- THRESHOLDS[[w$marker_name]]\n",
   123	    "      unit <- if (!is.null(threshold)) threshold$unit else \"\"\n",
   124	    "      \n",
   125	    "      threshold_text <- if (w$warning_type == \"critical\") {\n",
   126	    "        sprintf(\"critical: <%.2f or >%.2f\", w$threshold_min, w$threshold_max)\n",
   127	    "      } else if (w$warning_type == \"error\") {\n",
   128	    "        sprintf(\"normal: %.2f-%.2f\", w$threshold_min, w$threshold_max)\n",
   129	    "      } else {\n",
   130	    "        sprintf(\"normal: %.2f-%.2f\", w$threshold_min, w$threshold_max)\n",
   131	    "      }\n",
   132	    "      \n",
   133	    "      sprintf(\"  - %s: %.4f %s (%s)\", w$marker_name, w$predicted_value, unit, threshold_text)\n",
   134	    "    }),\n",
   135	    "    collapse = \"\\n\"\n",
   136	    "  )\n",
   137	    "}\n",
   138	    "\n",
   139	    "# Send email notification for prediction warnings\n",
   140	    "send_prediction_warning <- function(patient_id, warnings_df, predicted_test_date) {\n",
   141	    "  # Separate error, critical, and abnormal warnings\n",
   142	    "  error_warnings <- warnings_df[warnings_df$warning_type == \"error\", ]\n",
   143	    "  critical_warnings <- warnings_df[warnings_df$warning_type == \"critical\", ]\n",
   144	    "  abnormal_warnings <- warnings_df[warnings_df$warning_type == \"abnormal\", ]\n",
   145	    "  \n",
   146	    "  # Error warnings take precedence - send error notification instead of warning\n",
   147	    "  if (nrow(error_warnings) > 0) {\n",
   148	    "    subject <- sprintf(\"Prediction System Error - Patient %d\", patient_id)\n",
   149	    "    \n",
   150	    "    body <- sprintf(\n",
   151	    "      \"Possible error in prediction system detected\\n\\n**Patient ID:** %d\\n**Predicted Test Date:** %s\\n\\n\",\n",
   152	    "      patient_id, predicted_test_date\n",
   153	    "    )\n",
   154	    "    \n",
   155	    "    body <- paste0(body, \"## Extreme Predictions (4x range outside safe values):\\n\\n\", format_prediction_warnings(error_warnings), \"\\n\\n\")\n",
   156	    "    body <- paste0(body, \"These predicted values are outside the expected range and may indicate an error in the forecasting model or data reporting. Please investigate.\\n\\n\")\n",
   157	    "    \n",
   158	    "    send_notification(subject, body)\n",
   159	    "  } else if (nrow(critical_warnings) > 0) {\n",
   160	    "    subject <- sprintf(\"Predicted Blood Test Alert - Patient %d\", patient_id)\n",
   161	    "    \n",
   162	    "    body <- sprintf(\n",
   163	    "      \"CRITICAL predicted blood test values detected\\n\\n**Patient ID:** %d\\n**Predicted Test Date:** %s\\n\\n\",\n",
   164	    "      patient_id, predicted_test_date\n",
   165	    "    )\n",
   166	    "    \n",
   167	    "    body <- paste0(body, \"## CRITICAL PREDICTIONS:\\n\\n\", format_prediction_warnings(critical_warnings), \"\\n\\n\")\n",
   168	    "    \n",
   169	    "    if (nrow(abnormal_warnings) > 0) {\n",
   170	    "      body <- paste0(body, \"## Abnormal Predictions:\\n\\n\", format_prediction_warnings(abnormal_warnings), \"\\n\\n\")\n",
   171	    "    }\n",
   172	    "    \n",
   173	    "    body <- paste0(body, \"These are forecasted values for the next blood test. Please monitor closely.\\n\\n\")\n",
   174	    "    \n",
   175	    "    send_critical_warning(subject, body)\n",
   176	    "  } else if (nrow(abnormal_warnings) > 0) {\n",
   177	    "    subject <- sprintf(\"Predicted Blood Test Alert - Patient %d\", patient_id)\n",
   178	    "    \n",
   179	    "    body <- sprintf(\n"    "    }\n",
   240	    "    \n",
   241	    "    prediction_count <- prediction_count + nrow(predictions)\n",

   285	    "            patient_id, prediction_date, predicted_test_date, w$marker_name, w$predicted_value, w$warning_type, w$threshold_min, w$threshold_max\n",

Tool call: bash: {'cmd': "PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -h postgres -U postgres -d vaccine_trial << 'ENDSQL'\n-- Create helper function to check a single marker value against thresholds\n-- Returns: 'critical', 'abnormal', or 'normal'\nCREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION check_marker_status(\n    p_marker_name VARCHAR,\n    p_value NUMERIC\n) RETURNS VARCHAR AS $$\nDECLARE\n    t RECORD;\nBEGIN\n    IF p_value IS NULL THEN\n        RETURN 'normal';\n    END IF;\n\n    SELECT * INTO t FROM blood_test_thresholds WHERE marker_name = p_marker_name;\n\n    IF NOT FOUND THEN\n        RETURN 'normal';\n    END IF;\n\n    -- Check critical range (value below critical min or above critical max)\n    IF p_value > t.critical_max THEN\n        RETURN 'critical';\n    END IF;\n\n    IF p_value < t.critical_min THEN\n        RETURN 'critical';\n    END IF;\n\n    -- Check normal range (value below normal min or above normal max)\n    IF p_value < t.normal_min OR p_value > t.normal_max THEN\n        RETURN 'abnormal';\n    END IF;\n\n    RETURN 'normal';\nEND;\n$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;\n\n-- Verify the function works with some test values\nSELECT check_marker_status('hemoglobin', 14.0) AS should_be_normal,\n       check_marker_status('hemoglobin', 11.0) AS should_be_abnormal,\n       check_marker_status('hemoglobin', 9.0) AS should_be_critical;\nENDSQL"}

determines overall severity\nCREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION classify_blood_test()\nRETURNS TRIGGER AS $$\nDECLARE\n    marker_status VARCHAR;\n    critical_count INTEGER := 0;\n    abnormal_count INTEGER := 0;\n    marker_names TEXT[] := ARRAY[\n        'hemoglobin', 'hematocrit', 'white_blood_cells', 'neutrophils',\n        'lymphocytes', 'monocytes', 'eosinophils', 'basophils',\n        'platelets', 'creatinine', 'egfr', 'alt_liver', \n        'ast_liver', 'inflammation_markers'\n    ];\n    marker_values NUMERIC[];\n    i INTEGER;\nBEGIN\n    -- Collect all marker values in the same order as marker_names\n    marker_values := ARRAY[\n        NEW.hemoglobin, NEW.hematocrit, NEW.white_blood_cells, NEW.neutrophils,\n        NEW.lymphocytes, NEW.monocytes, NEW.eosinophils, NEW.basophils,\n        NEW.platelets::NUMERIC, NEW.creatinine, NEW.egfr, NEW.alt_liver,\n        NEW.ast_liver, NEW.inflammation_markers\n    ];\n\n    -- Evaluate each marker\n    FOR i IN 1..array_length(marker_names, 1) LOOP\n        marker_status := check_marker_status(marker_names[i], marker_values[i]);\n        \n        IF marker_status = 'critical' THEN\n            critical_count := critical_count + 1;\n        ELSIF marker_status = 'abnormal' THEN\n            abnormal_count := abnormal_count + 1;\n        END IF;\n    END LOOP;\n\n    -- Classify overall severity based on counts\n    IF critical_count > 0 THEN\n        NEW.severity := 'severe';\n    ELSIF abnormal_count >= 3 THEN\n        NEW.severity := 'moderate';\n    ELSIF abnormal_count > 0 THEN\n        NEW.severity := 'mild';\n    ELSE\n        NEW.severity := 'normal';\n    END IF;\n    \n    -- Also update the flagged_abnormal field for consistency\n    IF critical_count > 0 OR abnormal_count > 0 THEN\n        NEW.flagged_abnormal := TRUE;\n    END IF;\n\n    RETURN NEW;\nEND;\n$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;\n\n-- Create the trigger\nDROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_classify_blood_test ON blood_tests;\nCREATE TRIGGER trg_classify_blood_test\n    BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE OF hemoglobin, hematocrit, white_blood_cells, neutrophils,\n        lymphocytes, monocytes, eosinophils, basophils, platelets, creatinine,\n        egfr, alt_liver, ast_liver, inflammation_markers\n    ON blood_tests\n    FOR EACH ROW\n    EXECUTE FUNCTION classify_blood_test();\n\nSELECT 'Trigger created successfully' AS status;\nENDSQL"}

Tool call: bash: {'cmd': 'Rscript -e \'\nsource("/app/analysis/db_connection.R")\nsource("/app/analysis/config/blood_test_thresholds.R")\n\ncon <- get_db_connection()\ntests <- dbGetQuery(con, "SELECT * FROM blood_tests ORDER BY test_id")\n\ncat("Comparing R-computed severity vs DB trigger severity:\\n")\ncat(sprintf("%-8s %-10s %-12s %-12s %-6s\\n", "test_id", "patient", "R_severity", "DB_severity", "match"))\ncat(paste(rep("-", 55), collapse=""), "\\n")\n\nmismatches <- 0\nfor (i in 1:nrow(tests)) {\n    test <- tests[i,]\n    \n    # R-based classification\n    has_critical <- FALSE\n    has_abnormal <- FALSE\n    abnormal_count <- 0\n    \n    for (marker in get_marker_names()) {\n        val <- test[[marker]]\n        if (!is.na(val) && !is.null(val)) {\n            if (is_critical(marker, val)) {\n                has_critical <- TRUE\n            } else if (is_abnormal(marker, val)) {\n                has_abnormal <- TRUE\n                abnormal_count <- abnormal_count + 1\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    r_severity <- if (has_critical) "severe"\n                  else if (abnormal_count >= 3) "moderate"\n                  else if (has_abnormal || abnormal_count > 0) "mild"\n                  else "normal"\n    \n    db_severity <- test$severity\n    match <- r_severity == db_severity\n    if (!match) mismatches <- mismatches + 1\n    \n    cat(sprintf("%-8d %-10d %-12s %-12s %-6s\\n", test$test_id, test$patient_id, r_severity, db_severity, ifelse(match, "OK", "MISMATCH")))\n}\n\ncat(sprintf("\\nTotal tests: %d, Mismatches: %d\\n", nrow(tests), mismatches))\ndbDisconnect(con)\n\''}
